crons_tz: All cron expressions use local timezone (America/Los_Angeles). 0 7 = 7 AM PT = 14:00 UTC.

crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: rgos-task-poll
crons.prompt: Check for tasks assigned to you in the RGOS kanban: use mcp__rgos__cortex_list_tasks with assigned_to="dev" and status="approved". If any tasks are found, claim each one with mcp__rgos__cortex_claim_task (agent_id="dev"), then work them in priority order. Log a cortextos bus log-event for each claimed task. If no tasks, do nothing.

crons.name: codebase-scanner
crons.prompt: Run the codebase improvement scanner: execute `cortextos bus codebase-scan` in /home/cortextos/cortextos. This scans src/ for TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX markers and files >500 lines, writes a report to dev/output/YYYY-MM-DD-codebase-scan.md, and creates RGOS tasks for the top 3 actionable items. Update heartbeat to reflect this work.

crons.name: data-contract-guardrail-review
crons.prompt: Read prompts/cron-data-contract-guardrail-review.md and execute exactly one bounded review pass; write the artifact and exit.

crons.name: dirty-checkout-drift-watch
crons.prompt: Read prompts/cron-dirty-checkout-drift-watch.md and execute exactly one bounded shell-only drift check; do not mutate repositories; write the artifact and exit.

crons.name: live-ship-verifier
crons.prompt: Read prompts/cron-live-ship-verifier.md and execute exactly one bounded live-verification pass; use Orgo/Codex-CU for UI proof when needed; write the artifact and exit.

suppress_restart_telegram_note: 2026-05-27T15:47:52.509Z: Future restarts must not send boot/back-online Telegram messages; Telegram text is reserved for substantive user replies, blockers, decisions, or material status.
